description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image and defines a CONTAINER_IMAGE variable set to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH. Add a global before_script that installs curl with apk and logs into the GitLab Container Registry using docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. Define a single stage named build and a build job in that stage that runs the commands: docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true, docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest . , and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest. Assign the job the tags netsec and docker and do not specify any caches, artifacts, or rules.
